name: box-sistema
description: AND BILLUR TEXTILE — Warehouse and box management system

scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "cross-env NODE_ENV=development FRONTEND_MODE=proxy node server.js" "npm run dev --prefix web"
scripts.build:web: cross-env STATIC_EXPORT=1 npm run build --prefix web
scripts.build: npm run install:web && npm run build:web
